chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 591 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.5009/2023 (U/A) 2. For hearing of bail application 29.08.2023 Mr. Saif-ur-Rehman Naich, Advocate for applicant/accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Through instant bail application, applicant/accused Muhammad Shaban, son of Muhammad Bux, by caste Pathan, seeks protective bail in Crime No.01 of 2022 of Police Station Anti-Corruption Establishment, District Sukkur, registered for offences punishable under Sections 409, 420, P.P.C. read with Section 5 of the Prevention of Corruption Act, 1947. Learned Counsel for applicant/accused contends that the applicant is innocent, but he has been falsely implicated in this case. He further contends that applicant/accused is ready to appear before the Court concerned along with an application under Section 498, Cr.P.C. to prove his innocence, however, he apprehends his immediate arrest as non-bailable warrants has been issued against him; hence, he seeks protective bail. Without touching merits and de-merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 29.08.2023 to 04.09.2023 (both days inclusive) is granted to applicant/accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) and P.R. bond in Cr. Bail App. No. S – 591 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of non-bailable warrants in this case shall remain suspended during aforesaid period of seven days. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the Court concerned in aforementioned period.

Operation of non-bailable warrants in this case shall remain suspended during aforesaid period of seven days. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the Court concerned in aforementioned period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above seven days period or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case applicant/accused fails to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
